name: Zhejiang Feida Environmental Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Feida Environmental Science & Technology Co., Ltd. engages in designing and manufacturing equipment for air quality control in the People's Republic of China. It offers flue gas treatment products that include various electrostatic precipitators, fabric filters, flue/gas coolers/re-heaters, recycled semi-dry flue gas desulphurization systems, wet flue gas desulphurization systems, SCR/SNCR flue gas denitration systems, electric control products, and pneumatic ash conveying systems, as well as environmental protection systems. The company also provides water treatment products, such as water conversation and zero liquid discharge of power plant water system; water environment comprehensive treatment; and industrial sewage treatment. In addition, it offers solid waste treatment products that include hazardous waste treatment, food and kitchen waste resource utilization, and pollution free treatment, as well as waste incineration and tail gas purification systems; soil treatment and ecological restoration systems; and cyclic economy industrial park systems, as well as manufactures steel structure products. Zhejiang Feida Environmental Science & Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is based in Zhuji, China.
